    • Uses of Dependency in org.apache.paimon.tools.ci.utils.dependency

      Methods in org.apache.paimon.tools.ci.utils.dependency that return types with arguments of type Dependency 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Map<String,Set<Dependency>> DependencyParser.parseDependencyCopyOutput(Path buildOutput)
      Parses the output of a Maven build where dependency:copy was used, and returns a set of copied dependencies for each module.

    • Uses of Dependency in org.apache.paimon.tools.ci.utils.shade

      Methods in org.apache.paimon.tools.ci.utils.shade that return types with arguments of type Dependency 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Map<String,Set<Dependency>> ShadeParser.parseShadeOutput(Path buildOutput)
      Parses the output of a Maven build where shade:shade was used, and returns a set of bundled dependencies for each module.
